ddls:
CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status history entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the status history */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the order status was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the status update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status history was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status history was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Cash on Delivery, PayPal) */,
  "payment_method_description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid by the customer */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Pending, Paid, Failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each order status history entry
